APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGELINA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOEMAKER, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ANGIE SANCHEZ, ANGELINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 254 PRAGUE STREET, LOWER LEVEL UNIT, SF, CA $5,750.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,750.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-07-2005, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON FEB-07-2005 IN DEPT. 608 - STIPULATED SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD - JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF SHOEMAKERAND AGAINST DEFENDANTSANCHEZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $5750.00; RESTITUTION/POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 254 PRAGUE STREET, LOWER LEVERL, SF, FORFEITURE OF RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT AND FOR BACK RENT AND DAMAGES, BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. RELINQUISHMENT OF KEYS. STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT TO APRIL 7, 2005, 5 PM. IF DEFENDANT FAIL TO VACATE PREMISES BY SAID DATE, PLAINTIFF CAN MAKE AN EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR IMMEDIATE WRIT OF EXECUTION. IF TERMS AND CONDITION ARE MET, THEN PLAINTIFF WILL SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE ENTIRE ACTION. JUDGE: TOMAR MASON. REPORTER: LISA SARTO. CLERK: BARBARA HING (D608)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2005 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON FEB-07-2005 AT 9:45 AM IN DEPT. 608, TOMAR MASON. DEFENDANT SHOWED UP LATE AT TRIAL CALL. MATTER ASSIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L. DONDERO, CLERKS: V. MU/D. HAKEWILL REPORTER: NOREEN IKEUYE, #3538 (206)
